_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Panel A shows cropped results from the same blot hybridized for neurofibromin (NF1, 250 kD)
details: Successfully detected neurofibromin at 250 kD in Western blot analysis of immortalized cell line protein extracts
